steps: Remove slide from -80 °C freezer. Keep slide covered and allow to come to room temperature for 00:01:00 or until frost on slide dissipates.
Submerge slide into cold acetone (kept in -20 °C freezer) for 00:00:15
Gently dip slide 10 times into 1x PBS or until OCT appears to be washed off 1X Phosphate Buffered Saline Solution Contributed by users Catalog #BP2438-4
Submerge slide into 0.1% Cresyl Violet for 00:05:00
Gently rinse slide by dipping into H2O 10 times EMD Millipore™ Ultrapure Water for Molecular Biology Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #09-739-011
Gently dip slide 10 times into 1x PBS 1X Phosphate Buffered Saline Solution Contributed by users Catalog #BP2438-4
Dip and agitate slide 2 times into 95% EtOH
Dip and agitate slide 2 times into 100% EtOH Ethanol 200 Proof Decon Labs Catalog #2716
Submerge slide into 100% EtOH for 00:00:15 Ethanol 200 Proof Decon Labs Catalog #2716

Gently dip slide 2 times into Xylene Xylenes histological grade Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #534056-4L Flammable liquids (Category 3), H226 Acute toxicity, Inhalation (Category 4), H332 Skin irritation (Category 2), H315 Eye irritation (Category 2A), H319 Carcinogenicity (Category 2), H351

Submerge slide into Xylene for 00:00:20 Xylenes histological grade Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #534056-4L Flammable liquids (Category 3), H226 Acute toxicity, Inhalation (Category 4), H332 Skin irritation (Category 2), H315 Eye irritation (Category 2A), H319 Carcinogenicity (Category 2), H351
Allow slide to dry under chemical fume hood for 00:05:00 Proceed to LCM/LMD
creator: Shaina Robbins
